g.onclick: sendPrompt('Super admin dashboard P5: manage all tenants, view per-clinic metrics, toggle feature flags, trigger billing changes, see system health')
sendPrompt('Clinic dashboard P5: same P1-P4 dashboard but tenant-scoped, shows plan tier badge, feature flags conditionally render locked features')
sendPrompt('Member portal P5: unchanged from P4 — tenant resolved via subdomain, patient sees only their clinic data')
sendPrompt('API Gateway P5: Nginx or Traefik, subdomain extraction (clinic-abc.platform.com → X-Tenant-ID: abc), per-plan rate limiting, TLS termination, health check routing')
g.text: Subdomain routing · per-plan rate limits · TLS termination

svg.text: NestJS API — P1–P4 modules + platform layer (all run per-tenant)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('TenantMiddleware P5: reads X-Tenant-ID header from gateway, loads tenant record from public schema, calls SET search_path = tenant_{id}, public on the connection before any ORM query')
sendPrompt('FeatureGuard P5: @RequireFeature(Feature.TELEMEDICINE) decorator, checks tenant plan in Redis cache, throws 403 PLAN_UPGRADE_REQUIRED with { feature, currentPlan, requiredPlan }')
sendPrompt('PlanEnforcer P5: per-booking and per-seat quota checks, INCR usage counters in Redis (bookings:month:{tenantId}), blocks with 429 QUOTA_EXCEEDED on limit hit')
sendPrompt('PostgreSQL P5: public schema holds tenants/subscriptions/feature_flags, tenant_{id} schema holds all P1-P4 tables — SET search_path isolates data completely per request')
sendPrompt('Redis P5: same instance as P1-P3, adds per-tenant usage counters (bookings:month:{id}), feature flag cache (plan:{tenantId}), and tenant record cache to avoid DB lookup per request')
sendPrompt('S3 P5: same bucket, isolation by key prefix: bucket/{tenantId}/files — IAM policy can scope per-tenant access in enterprise tier')
sendPrompt('Stripe P5: one Customer per tenant, subscription plans (basic/pro/enterprise), seat metering, webhook for subscription.created/updated/deleted → update tenant plan in DB + Redis cache')
sendPrompt('Notifications P5: SendGrid + Twilio from P3 — unchanged. Already scoped by user_id which is tenant-isolated by search_path')
sendPrompt('Observability P5: Prometheus scrapes /metrics, Grafana dashboards with tenant_id label filtering, Loki for structured JSON logs, OpenTelemetry traces with tenantId span attribute')
